visual_description: Three men in dark clothing stand in a dimly lit, cluttered room filled with old furniture and objects. The man in the center, with platinum blonde hair, points a wand forward, flanked by two other men who also hold wands in a similar stance. All three are looking intently forward, their expressions serious and focused.
audio_description: A low, ominous, and sustained musical tone plays in the background, creating a tense and suspenseful atmosphere.
